source: prod Turso query via scripts/runway-migrations/_asprey-query-prod.ts (ad-hoc, not committed)
note: Captured before running asprey-v4-touchup-2026-04-21.ts. The migration script writes its own apply-mode pre-apply snapshot at run time (consumed by REVERT).

L1s.name: Social Retainer — Wind Down
L1s.resources: AM: Allison, CM: Sami, PM: Jason
L1s.notes: Daily social posts + ManyChat automations through 4/30. Account closes EOM April. Sami executing day-to-day under Allison. Jason handling Google Sheet/ManyChat disconnect as part of cutoff.

L2s.title: Disconnect Google Sheet from ManyChat
L2s.notes: Clean cutoff task. Part of retainer wind-down.

L2s.title: Daily Social Posts + ManyChat — Retainer (through 4/30)
L2s.notes: Daily posts weekdays + pre-scheduled weekend content. ManyChat flow maintenance. Retainer ends 4/30 EOM. Do not split into daily items — this represents the ongoing workstream.

L2s.title: Retainer Close — Final Post
L2s.notes: Last day of retainer. Final post published. Account closeout. No work after this date.

changesRequired: L1 engagement_type: null -> 'retainer' (raw UPDATE + audit; field not in PROJECT_FIELDS)
L1 contract_end: null -> '2026-04-30' (raw UPDATE + audit; field not in PROJECT_FIELDS)
Client team: 'Allison (lead)' -> 'AM: Allison, CM: Sami, PM: Jason' (v4 role-prefix format, engaged-roles-per-L1 semantics; team IS in CLIENT_FIELDS so updateClientField is used)
verifications: L1 owner = 'Allison' — already v4 compliant (single accountable person, no role prefix)
L1 resources = 'AM: Allison, CM: Sami, PM: Jason' — already v4 compliant (full engaged roster, role-prefix format)
L1 status='in-production' / category='active' — accurate (L2s are in-flight with 'in-progress' status)
L1 startDate=2026-04-20, endDate=2026-04-30 — already derived correctly from L2s (MIN=4/20, MAX=4/30)
L2 owners all set (Jason, Allison, Allison). Null resources on 2 L2s is OK per v4 (single-person inferred from L1)
No L2 orphans (all 3 have projectId pointing to the single L1)

derivationCheck.conclusion: Already matches; explicit recomputeProjectDates call still made at end of migration for safety (TP decision #4).

l2ResourceNullDecision.reasoning: Per v4 rules: 'Null OK if single person (inferred from L1)'. Both tasks are owner-only Allison work. No team > 1 so resources stays null.
